---
name: General Feedback
about: Provide feedback on clarity, structure, implications, or domain applicability
title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Feedback

### What part of the project does this relate to?

- [ ] A specific chapter (which one?): 
- [ ] Overall structure or navigation
- [ ] Evidence base
- [ ] Contributing process
- [ ] Documentation clarity
- [ ] Domain applicability
- [ ] Other: 

### What's your feedback?

<!-- 
  Some prompts if helpful:
  - Is something unclear? What specifically?
  - Did you see an implication the framework hasn't addressed?
  - Does a domain application miss important constraints from your field?
  - Is a term used inconsistently or ambiguously?
  - Did you get lost navigating the repository?
  
  All feedback is valuable. You don't need to have a solution — 
  identifying the problem is itself a contribution.
-->

### Your background (optional)

<!-- 
  Knowing your perspective helps us understand the feedback.
  Examples: "AI researcher," "practicing physician," "philosophy PhD student," 
  "software engineer building recommendation systems," "policy analyst."
  
  This is entirely optional. Anonymous feedback is welcomed equally.
-->

### Suggested improvement (optional)

<!-- 
  If you have a specific suggestion for how to address your feedback, 
  include it here. If not, that's fine — the observation alone is helpful.
-->

---

*Thank you for taking the time to provide feedback. This project is designed to be improved by its readers. If something confused you, it will confuse others — and clarity serves coherence. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for how feedback is incorporated.*
